## Idea

What learning outcome or training gap should this improve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the scenario, workflow, or artifact you want to add.

## Why It Helps

Explain what this would teach and why it belongs in a synthetic repo.

## Constraints

Please note any Windows-first, local-only, or synthetic-only considerations.
